feature: Distribution Hub - Central Control Center for Content Distribution
summary: Tested all 16 Distribution Hub backend API endpoints (100% pass rate) and frontend with 6 tabs. Backend: Content CRUD, distribution/delivery, export packages, platform connections, stats all working. Frontend: Hub Dashboard, Content Library, Distribute, Delivery Tracking, Rights & Metadata, Platform Connections tabs all functional with proper UI elements.

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/distribution-hub/platforms returns all 51 platforms in 6 categories
POST /api/distribution-hub/content creates content with full metadata
POST /api/distribution-hub/deliveries/{id}/export generates export package with source_of_truth
POST /api/distribution-hub/upload uploads file and creates content

frontend_tests.test: All 6 tabs present (dashboard, content, distribute, tracking, rights, connections)
Hub Dashboard shows stats cards (Total Content, Deliveries, Delivered, Queued, Export Ready, Failed)
Hub Dashboard shows content type breakdown (Audio, Video, Image, Film)
Content Library tab shows content list with type icons and dates
Content Library has filter buttons (All, Audio, Video, Image, Film)
Content Library Add Content button opens form
Add Content form has title, type, artist, genre, ISRC, UPC inputs
Distribute tab shows Step 1 content selector
Distribute tab shows Step 2 platform picker with 6 categories
Distribute tab has platform search input
Distribute tab has Distribute Now button
Delivery Tracking shows status filter buttons
Delivery Tracking shows delivery list with status badges and actions
Rights & Metadata tab shows content items for editing
Platform Connections shows connected platforms (1 SoundCloud)
Platform Connections shows 19 available platforms for connection
Navigation bar Content dropdown has Distribution Hub link

features_verified.content_crud: Full CRUD operations with metadata (ISRC, UPC, copyright, licensing)

critical_code_review_comments: All 16 API endpoints properly implemented and returning correct data
Platform API integrations (YouTube, TikTok, etc.) are MOCKED - deliveries tracked but not actually sent
Export packages generated with full metadata but files need manual upload to platforms
Source of truth URL comes from FRONTEND_URL env var
Frontend has all 6 tabs with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation bar has Distribution Hub link in Content dropdown (purple highlighted)
seed_data_creation: Test content created during backend tests (TEST_HUB_* prefixed items). SoundCloud connected during platform connection test.

mocked_api.description: Platform API integrations are not yet live - deliveries to api_push platforms are tracked but not actually sent. Export packages are generated with all metadata but files need manual upload.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Distribution Hub is a new feature with 16 API endpoints under /api/distribution-hub/. Frontend has 6 tabs. 51 platforms across 6 categories. api_push platforms get 'queued' status, export_package platforms get 'export_ready' status. Platform APIs are MOCKED. Test data has TEST_HUB_ prefix. SoundCloud is connected via test.
